scope: Phase 3 UMI - analysis assumptions for Arcaea

notes.combo_definition: ground-lane taps/holds plus sky arcs and arc-taps on a beat-aligned timeline

tips.rationale: Arcaea charts combine ground lanes with spatial arc mechanics, enabling deterministic timing, spatial awareness, and hand-movement tips when processed by Phase 4.

table.name: adapter-validator canonical kinds alignment
table.expected: All emitted note kinds must be within schema.canonical_kinds

table.name: arcaea-native validation parity
table.expected: Canonical note_events must match Arcaea-native ground truth

table.name: per-section combo validation parity
table.expected: Per-section combo counts must align when sections are present

table.name: tips enablement gate
table.expected: Tips generation must respect Phase 4 gating

consistency_checks.notes: Arcaea consistency checks emphasize adapter/validator parity with Arcaea-native logic and enforce Phase-3 structural scope and Phase-4 gating per the Bandori anchor.
